name_cn:
【Top Grade Factory】
MCM Aren Visetos
Small Boston Bag
Exclusive®️ Classic Cognac Color
This Aren Boston bag offers a new interpretation of the classic silhouette, paying homage to MCM's rooted travel philosophy. Its shape evokes a weekend travel bag with clean lines and a convenient extended zipper. Exquisite craftsmanship, meticulous attention to detail, with the top handle hand-wrapped, stitched, and edge-painted.
Size: 23*11*15cm
Strap: Removable/Adjustable 102-118cm
Color: Cognac/Brown 🟫
